RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0013 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Sofia Cohen Date of Birth: 16/07/1972 SSN (tokenized): TKN-466868 Annual Income: $47,000 Employer: Acme Logistics Loan Amount: $57,000 Term (months): 48 Branch: Toronto Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN97824AL Kia 320i 2022 EV CPO 49,000 Authorized Signature: Sofia Cohen
